model_details.name: CyberFusion MuleDetector v2.3
model_details.description: Detects money mule accounts, compromised accounts, and financial crime exit points by correlating cybersecurity telemetry with transactional behavioral patterns.

intended_use.primary_use: Real-time mule account detection in banking transaction monitoring systems

training_data_summary.anonymization: All PII removed. Account IDs hashed with SHA-256. Transaction amounts bucketed.

ethical_considerations.bias_testing: Model tested across demographic proxies. No significant disparity detected across geographic regions.
ethical_considerations.fairness_metric: Equalized odds difference < 0.03 across all tested subgroups
ethical_considerations.human_oversight: All model outputs require analyst review before account action. Model is advisory only.
ethical_considerations.explainability: SHAP values computed for every prediction in production

limitations: Performance may degrade on novel attack vectors not present in training data
Graph features require minimum 30-day transaction history
Dark web signal features dependent on third-party threat intel feed freshness
Model trained primarily on Asian and Western markets — may underperform in underrepresented regions

versioning.v2.0: 2024-03-15 — Multi-class, 41 features, graph features added, AUC 0.978
